diagrams.title: SELECT Query Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the logical order of SQL query processing from FROM to SELECT
diagrams.purpose: Helps students understand why WHERE comes before GROUP BY and how queries are logically processed

diagrams.title: INSERT Statement Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of INSERT INTO statement components
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies that column names and values must match in order and data type

diagrams.title: UPDATE Statement Process
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how UPDATE statement modifies data in a table
elements: WHERE clause identifies which rows to update
If WHERE omitted - ALL rows affected
diagrams.purpose: Emphasizes the importance of WHERE clause to avoid unintended updates

diagrams.title: WHERE vs HAVING Visual Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of WHERE and HAVING in query execution
elements: WHERE: Filter individual rows → BEFORE grouping
HAVING: Filter groups → AFTER GROUP BY
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishes when to use WHERE vs HAVING based on logical query processing order
